response: To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by reading food labels and avoiding [sweetened beverages] and [processed snacks]. Replace sugary foods with fresh fruits, vegetables, and whole grains. Use natural sweeteners like honey or maple syrup in moderation. Drink plenty of water to curb cravings. Cook at home to control ingredients. Gradually reduce sugar intake to avoid withdrawal symptoms. Choose unsweetened versions of your favorite foods. Limit desserts and opt for healthier alternatives.
